auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue your learning journey.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create a free account in 30 seconds.

errors.password_short: Password must be at least 6 characters

auth.agreeTos: I agree to Vibe English's <link>Terms & Policy</link>
auth.agreeTosRequired: Please agree to the Terms & Policy
auth.brandingDesc: Learn English from real videos. AI grades and adapts your path to your level + goals.

terms.title: Terms & Policy
terms.s1Body: By creating a Vibe English account and using the service you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not register or stop using the service.
terms.s2Body: You are responsible for keeping your credentials secure. Vibe English may suspend or remove accounts that violate the terms (spam, fraudulent activity, infringing on course-content copyright, etc.).
terms.s3Body: All videos, transcripts, exercises and AI-generated feedback on Vibe English are copyrighted by the platform. You may use them for personal learning; redistribution or commercial use without written consent is prohibited.
terms.s4Body: We collect email, name, year of birth, gender, learning goals and lesson history to personalize your path. Data is stored securely and never shared with third parties except as required by law. You can request deletion of your personal data at any time.
terms.s5Body: Vibe English uses AI models to grade, generate exercises and recommend a path. AI results may not be perfectly accurate — please consult teachers or other sources for high-stakes exams (TOEIC, IELTS).
terms.s6Body: Vibe English may update these terms as needed. Users will be notified via email or in-app notification before new terms take effect.
terms.s7Body: Vibe English is provided "as-is". We are not liable for any indirect damage arising from using the service outside ordinary English learning.
